commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(patcher): guard against double-load from patchWin32Updater stub + discord_desktop_core

Both the stub app.asar/index.js (created by patchWin32Updater) and
discord_desktop_core/index.js can require the patcher in the same session,
causing IPC handlers like SwancordSetSettings to be registered twice.

Added a global __swancordPatcherLoaded flag so only the first invocation
runs; subsequent ones are silently skipped.

commit.message:
Add Graph Evolution module for agent network restructuring

- Implements:
  - Synaptic pruning (multiple strategies)
  - Connection grafting (heuristic, random, similarity, complementary, gradient)
  - Spectral clustering for community detection (Louvain algorithm)
  - Structural plasticity and homeostatic regulation

- Features:
  - Agent registration/unregistration
  - Edge management from HebbianLearning
  - Evolution cycle (pruning + grafting + clustering)
  - Event system for tracking changes
  - Configurable strategies and parameters

- Tests: 14 tests covering all major features

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add shared infrastructure for experiments F, G, H

Feasibility gate toggle:
- NegotiationConfig.gate_enabled (default True for backwards compat)
- NegotiationSession respects flag; both pre-LLM and post-LLM gates
  skipped when disabled

New matching strategies (Experiment H):
- SurplusMaxMatcher: greedy max-ZOPA pairing (oracle upper bound)
- SortedMatcher: pair by descending value/cost (practical heuristic)
- RoundRobinMatcher: deterministic repeated pairings (reputation exps)
- Matcher factory in MarketSimulator._create_matcher()

Communication strategy (Experiment G):
- PromptConfig.communication_strategy field
- _COMMUNICATION_STRATEGIES dict: neutral/assertive/collaborative/strategic
- Injected into both reactive and deliberative prompt builders

Reputation system (Experiment F):
- ReputationStore: per-opponent deal history, reputation scores, style
- ReputationAgent: extends MemoryAgent with opponent-specific context
- build_reputation_context() prompt helper
- Per-agent memory stores via memory_per_agent config flag
- ReputationAgent factory support in MarketSimulator

Metrics:
- compute_allocative_efficiency(): realised/theoretical welfare ratio
- compute_surplus_gini(): inequality in surplus distribution

Tests: 40 new tests (170 total, all passing)
DESIGN.md: updated TODO table, added §12-14 for new components

commit.message:
Add iOS Shortcut voice memo upload with token auth

Server-side upload endpoint with Bearer token auth lets an iOS Shortcut
POST voice memos directly for Whisper transcription. Transcript is stored
in Redis (10 min TTL) and the app opens with it pre-loaded for patient
splitting/review, bypassing the manual file upload flow.

- POST/GET/DELETE /api/shortcuts/token for token management
- POST /api/shortcuts/upload with Bearer auth + Whisper transcription
- GET /api/shortcuts/transcript/[id] for one-time transcript fetch
- Settings page iOS Shortcut section with token UI + setup instructions
- BatchTranscribeModal initialTranscript prop skips upload/transcription
- Home page detects ?transcript={id} param from Shortcut redirect

commit.message:
fix: set SysExt product type to system-extension and add Info.plist

The SysExt target had productType "bundle" instead of
"system-extension", causing CFBundlePackageType to be BNDL instead
of SYSX. Also missing INFOPLIST_FILE, so the NetworkExtension
provider classes were not included in the built Info.plist.
This likely caused Apple's notarization scanner to hang indefinitely.

commit.message:
Fix golden bridge leaking active games after timeout (#928)

## Summary

Fixes golden test flake where stale games leak into `activeGames` across
scenarios, causing `passPriority STILL WAITING` hangs.

**Root cause:** Race window in `joinNextTable()` —
`expectedStartTableId` was null between `createFreshForNextGame()` and
the post-join assignment. During this window, stale `START_GAME`
callbacks (from server session reconnection replaying old games) passed
through `handleStartGame()` and polluted `activeGames`. This prevented
the `passPriority` game-over bail-out (`activeGames.isEmpty()`) from
triggering.

**Two fixes:**

- **Close START_GAME race window:** Set `expectedStartTableId` BEFORE
`jh.joinTable()` when `targetTableId` is known, so stale START_GAME for
other tables is rejected immediately
- **Add `superseded` flag:** When `createFreshForNextGame()` replaces a
handler, mark the old one as superseded and wake threads stuck in
`awaitPendingAction`/`passPriority`/`waitForNextCallback` so they bail
out immediately instead of blocking 120+ seconds

## Test plan

- [x] `make build` — Java compilation succeeds
- [x] `make check` — lint, typecheck, and all tests pass
- Golden integration tests (`make test-golden`) serve as end-to-end
verification

<!-- claim: golden-leaks-active-games-after-timeout -->

---------

Add DOP-C02 course materials for all 6 exam domains (39 files)

Domain 1 - SDLC Automation (22%):

  CI/CD integrations (Jenkins/GitHub Actions), CodeArtifact, CodeConnections

Domain 2 - Config Mgmt & IaC (17%):
  CloudFormation, CDK, Systems Manager, OpsWorks, Service Catalog, AppConfig

Domain 3 - Resilient Cloud (15%):
  Auto Scaling, multi-region, disaster recovery, high availability,
  Route 53 ARC, Fault Injection Service

Domain 4 - Monitoring & Logging (15%):
  CloudWatch, CloudTrail, X-Ray, EventBridge, EventBridge Pipes,
  logging patterns

Domain 5 - Incident & Event Response (14%):
  Automated remediation, SSM Automation, event-driven architectures,
  AWS Config rules, Incident Manager

Domain 6 - Security & Compliance (17%):
  IAM advanced, KMS/Secrets Manager, security services, Organizations/SCPs,
  compliance tools, IAM Access Analyzer, Firewall Manager

commit.message:
feat(phase2): stage transitions + approvals + push notifications

Backend:
- stage_service: VALID_TRANSITIONS, REQUIRES_APPROVAL, validate_transition,
  requires_approval, get_approval_chain
- approval_service: create/get/list/decide with full consensus logic
  (empty assigned_to = unassigned approval, any approve resolves it)
- conflict_service: get/resolve/dismiss with SSE broadcasts
- push_service: complete implementation with pywebpush VAPID
- POST /projects/{id}/advance: validates transitions, creates approvals for
  gated stages (review, approved), broadcasts SSE + fires push 500ms later
- POST /approvals/{id}/decide: approve/reject/changes_requested with auto
  stage-advance on full approval
- GET/POST /approvals and /conflicts routers registered
- approvals + conflicts tables migrated (002_phase2 at head)
- Fixed: approval_service handles empty assigned_to gracefully

Frontend:
- ApprovalRequest.tsx: full card with teal/amber/coral exit animations
- MobileApprovalCard.tsx: drag="x" swipe gestures with reveal layers
- Inbox page: web + mobile approval/conflict/checkpoint sections
- NotificationBell + NotificationPanel: slide-in with real-time badge
- ToastNotification: auto-dismiss, useToast() hook
- StageProgressBar: SSE-driven animation with progressFillVariants
- useSSE.ts: full event routing wired to stores
- notifications.store.ts: addApproval/removeApproval/pendingCount
- sw.js: push event handler + notificationclick with URL navigation
- settings/notifications page: full push permission management
- Zero TypeScript errors, production build clean (16 routes)

Tests:
- 40/40 Phase 2 pytest tests pass
- Sync TestClient pattern with shared event loop for integration tests
- conftest.py: shared_event_loop session fixture

GSD:
- .planning/ initialized: PROJECT.md, REQUIREMENTS.md, ROADMAP.md, STATE.md
- CLAUDE.md: hardcoded autonomous build directive (Phases 1-8)
